ast.name: appendText
ast.source: To edit profile settings, use the "Manage Profiles" button in the main Decks panel.
ast.target: 要编辑配置文件设置，请使用主牌组面板中的“管理配置文件”按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display progress bar during review sessions
ast.target: 在复习会话期间显示进度条

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable keyboard shortcuts in review modal (1-4 for difficulty)
ast.target: 在复习弹窗中启用键盘快捷键（1-4 表示难度）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum duration for flashcard review sessions in minutes (1-60)
ast.target: 闪卡复习会话的最长时长（分钟，1-60）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hour when the study day rolls over (0-23, default is 4). Reviews done before this hour count toward the previous day's statistics and daily limits.
ast.target: 学习日切换的小时（0-23，默认 4）。此时间之前完成的复习计入前一天的统计和每日上限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limit scanning to a specific folder. Select 'scan entire vault' to scan all files.
ast.target: 将扫描限制到特定文件夹。选择“扫描整个库”以扫描所有文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to refresh deck stats in the side panel (in seconds)
ast.target: 侧边栏中牌组统计的刷新频率（秒）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically refresh deck stats in the side panel
ast.target: 自动刷新侧边栏中的牌组统计

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notification messages for completed review sessions and sync operations
ast.target: 为已完成的复习会话和同步操作显示通知消息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show detailed logging in the console for sync operations and flashcard processing
ast.target: 在控制台显示同步操作和闪卡处理的详细日志

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show performance timing metrics in the console (sync times, parsing performance, etc.)
ast.target: 在控制台显示性能计时指标（同步耗时、解析性能等）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run database operations in a background worker thread to prevent UI freezing with large databases. Requires restart to take effect.
ast.target: 在后台工作线程中运行数据库操作，以防止大型数据库导致界面卡顿。需重启生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Permanently delete all flashcards, review history, and deck data. This will force a clean rebuild from your vault files. All progress will be lost!
ast.target: 永久删除所有闪卡、复习历史和牌组数据。这将强制从你的仓库文件中重新干净构建。所有进度将丢失！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically backup review data after each session
ast.target: 每次会话后自动备份复习数据

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of backups to keep (3-10)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a manual backup of your flashcard database
ast.target: 创建闪卡数据库的手动备份

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a profile to view and edit
ast.target: 选择要查看和编辑的配置文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable daily limit for new cards

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum new cards to introduce per day (1-9999)
ast.target: 每天引入的新卡最大数量（1-9999）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable daily limit for review cards

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval when pressing Again on a new card (e.g. 1m)
ast.target: 新卡点击 Again 时的间隔（例如 1m）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Interval when pressing Again on a review card (e.g. 10m)
ast.target: 复习卡点击 Again 时的间隔（例如 10m）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Order in which cards are reviewed

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select tag to apply profile to all its decks
ast.target: 选择标签以将配置应用到其所有牌组

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a profile for this tag

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the deck in Anki where cards will be imported
ast.target: 在 Anki 中将导入卡片的牌组名称

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是组件
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 卸载闪卡复习组件时出错：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Tried to use the 'fill' option without the 'Filler' plugin enabled. Please import and register the 'Filler' plugin and make sure it is not disabled in the options
ast.target: 在未启用“Filler”插件的情况下尝试使用“fill”选项。请导入并注册“Filler”插件，并确保它未在选项中被禁用

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Plugin not available for Anki export
ast.target: 用于 Anki 导出的插件不可用

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 卸载牌组列表面板时出错：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a backup to restore

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to purge database. Check the console for details.
ast.target: 清除数据库失败。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Confirmation text doesn't match. Database purge cancelled.
ast.target: 确认文本不匹配。已取消清除数据库。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: New cards per day must be between 1 and 9999
ast.target: 每日新卡片数量必须在 1 到 9999 之间

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Review cards per day must be between 1 and 9999
ast.target: 每日复习卡片数量必须在 1 到 9999 之间

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Request retention must be between 0.5 and 0.995
ast.target: 请求保留率必须在 0.5 到 0.995 之间

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法删除 DEFAULT 配置文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No flashcards found in this deck to export
ast.target: 此牌组中未找到可导出的抽认卡

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to export deck to Anki format
ast.target: 导出牌组为 Anki 格式失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error refreshing decks. Check console for details.
ast.target: 刷新牌组时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error starting review. Check console for details.
ast.target: 开始复习时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error starting browse. Check console for details.
ast.target: 开始浏览时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to load decks plugin. Check the console for details.
ast.target: 加载牌组插件失败。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only a single interval value is allowed (e.g. 1m, 10m, 1h).
ast.target: 只允许一个间隔值（例如 1m、10m、1h）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only a single interval value is allowed (e.g. 10m, 1h).
ast.target: 只允许一个间隔值（例如 10m、1h）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Debug settings for troubleshooting and development.
ast.target: 用于故障排查和开发的调试设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Experimental features may be unstable. Use with caution and back up your data.
ast.target: 实验性功能可能不稳定。请谨慎使用并备份数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Manage your flashcard database. Use with caution - these actions cannot be undone.
ast.target: 管理你的闪卡数据库。请谨慎使用——这些操作无法撤销。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will permanently delete all flashcard data including:
ast.target: 这将永久删除所有闪卡数据，包括：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 完整的复习历史和进度

ast.name: text
ast.source: The database will be rebuilt from your current vault files, but all progress will be lost.
ast.target: 数据库将从你当前的保管库文件重建，但所有进度都会丢失。

ast.name: text
ast.source: To confirm this action, type the text shown in the placeholder below
ast.target: 要确认此操作，请输入下方占位符中显示的文本

ast.name: text
ast.target: 按状态的卡片分布（圆环图）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review Activity by Hour of Day
ast.target: 按一天小时统计的复习活动
